featureName: BUG-031-003: Capture process/search E2E processing timeout

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for capture process/search E2E processing_status timeout. No source or parent certification fields modified.
Fixed ML sidecar LLM connection failure causing processing timeout. Added fallback mechanism for unavailable LLM services and adversarial regression test for empty processing status.

Completed root-cause repair for TestE2E_CaptureProcessSearch without weakening status expectations. Fixed stale test image rebuild gap, ML Docker package metadata stripping, embedding cache/home provisioning for the non-root ML runtime, embedder pending-count leak on model-load failure, and degraded text search matching for processed captured content. Focused E2E now passes with artifact 01KQ8N1HC5QV99FTBG4YDGFZG0 reaching processed status and appearing in search results; adversarial empty/missing/failed/unknown status regression passes. Go unit, Python unit, check, and format gates pass. Validation-owned certification fields left unchanged.

Recorded owned test-phase provenance for BUG-031-003. Current-session focused E2E through `./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run TestE2E_CaptureProcessSearch` exited 0 with TestE2E_CaptureProcessSearch and TestE2E_CaptureProcessSearch_AdversarialEmptyStatus passing; fresh broad `./smackerel.sh test e2e` retry also exited 0 with shell E2E 34/34 passed and the target tests passing inside the full Go E2E package. Regression-quality guard exited 0 with an adversarial signal and 0 violations; skip-marker and mock/interception scans found no matches in tests/e2e/capture_process_search_test.go. Full integration green is intentionally not claimed because unrelated BUG-022-001 NATS failures remain. Certification fields left unchanged for bubbles.validate.

Completed BUG-031-003 regression diagnostics. Focused capture/process/search E2E exited 0 with processed status, text_fallback search, and adversarial status coverage passing; broad E2E exited 0 across shell and Go packages; Go unit exited 0; Python ML unit exited 0 with 352 passed; regression-quality and skip/mock scans were clean. Full integration remains exit 1 only on known BUG-022-001 NATS cases, while ML readiness/fallback checks passed. Certification fields left unchanged.

Completed BUG-031-003 simplification review across ML cache/embedder/processor/main, degraded search fallback, processing-status E2E polling, runtime health, Dockerfile cache/package behavior, and SST config generation. No source simplification changes were applied because the reviewed complexity preserves live-stack readiness, fail-loud config, adversarial status detection, non-root ML cache behavior, and degraded text search recovery. Full integration green was not claimed; the known BUG-022-001 NATS caveat remains preserved. Certification fields left unchanged.

Completed BUG-031-003 stability diagnostic under repo-standard execution. Focused capture/process/search E2E exited 0 with the captured artifact reaching processed status and returning from search; broad E2E exited 0 with shell E2E 34/34 passed and target Go E2E passing inside the full package; check and regression-quality guard exited 0. No source, test, config, Docker, or generated config changes were required. Full integration green is not claimed; the unrelated BUG-022-001 NATS caveat remains preserved. Certification fields left unchanged.

Completed BUG-031-003 security diagnostic. Reviewed secret leakage, generated config leakage, auth/search exposure, degraded fallback behavior, injection risk, IDOR/silent-decode scan gates, and Docker/runtime permissions. No secret leak, auth bypass, unsafe fallback, unsafe search exposure, or generated config leak was found. One medium Docker supply-chain/freshness finding remains open: docker-compose.yml changed Ollama from pinned 0.6 to floating latest and is routed to bubbles.implement. Full integration green is not claimed; the unrelated BUG-022-001 NATS caveat remains preserved. Certification fields left unchanged.

Remediated SEC-031-003-01 by restoring docker-compose.yml Ollama image tag to ollama/ollama:0.6. Repo-standard check and build gates passed for the Docker image identity repair. Certification fields remain unchanged.

Re-ran BUG-031-003 security closeout after SEC-031-003-01 remediation. Verified active Compose uses ollama/ollama:0.6 and contains no ollama/ollama:latest; current Compose diff contains no Ollama image change. Reassessed auth/search exposure, secret-log patterns, degraded fallback config, runtime permissions, IDOR/silent-decode gates, and governance surfaces. ./smackerel.sh check, ./smackerel.sh lint, ./smackerel.sh build, implementation-reality-scan, artifact-lint, and traceability-guard exited 0. No open security findings remain. Certification fields left unchanged.

Recorded audit-owned phase provenance for the existing BUG-031-003 audit evidence in report.md. Prior audit disposition remains unchanged: runtime BUG-031 behavior is clean, promotion/certification stays validate-owned, and full integration green is not claimed because the unrelated BUG-022-001 NATS caveat remains preserved. Certification fields left unchanged.

Recorded validate phase after audit provenance repair. Artifact lint and traceability guard exited 0 before certification edits; pre-certification state-transition guard isolated the remaining validate-owned blockers: missing validate phase and empty completedScopes while Scope 1 is Done. Reconciled certification.completedScopes and certification.scopeProgress. Post-edit done-mode artifact lint exposed report evidence blockers, so top-level status remains in_progress and full integration green remains unclaimed because unrelated BUG-022-001 NATS failures are preserved.
